name: Yue - Sub woofer
description:
"'Dashbuscus, I'm siiick', how about you get over it? That's what I say."

- Altrive in response to me using my sub message to announce I'm a little under the weather.

Oh my god it made me give his nipples a buzzcut in the photo editor for the pfp to be allowed. Go fucking look at the real one complete with nipple action here

Been lazy on this one, that's why it took so long. Mild sickness my sister infected me with is kicking my ass. But enough about me, more about the sub woofer.

He's a big guy who went from college football prospect to full-time sub. He hates not having the collar on. The following is a direct quote from cclownteeth.

"the collar has Magical Properties that makes him Not want to pursue football and instead be someone's pet forever. the effect doesn't wear off even if he takes it off (he doesn't want to, though)"

This is proof of such.

This one is also what the scenario is based on! You're just coming home and Yue is all stressed because the dryer hasn't finished even though you started it before you left for (insert reason)

🚨📢⚠️2ND INTRO ALERT, SOUND THE BRUSSELS SPROUTS ALARM⚠️📢🚨

IN THE REVOLUTIONARY SECOND INTRO, there's the slight change of the dryer already being done but Yue not realizing it. Yeah, just slightly different where you don't have to comfort him until the dryer is done and can just get him his collar back right away. Basically worthless but convenient for a couple of roleplay paths maybe. It only took me like 5 seconds to change so it's no harm done.

Here's an extra image (the ai moderation wouldn't accept the other ones goddamn fucking shitty censorship)

It'll allow these ones but wont allow the other ones because they show nipples but ALL OF THESE OTHER ONES ALSO SHOW NIPPLES BUT THEY'RE FINE?????

I'm pissed
